## How Ava runs outbound   autonomously

Set your outbound strategy once. Ava finds the leads, runs the campaigns, and books the meetings.

1

### She finds and prioritizes high-intent leads

Search 250M+ verified B2B contacts or import from your CRM. Ava enriches prospects using 22+ data sources, then prioritizes them by likelihood to convert using intent signals like funding rounds and leadership hires.

2

### She launches personalized multi-channel sequences

Ava sends personalized multi-channel outreach across email and social. She queues call steps in the native dialer so your reps can click and dial without leaving the platform.

3

### She tests and optimizes messaging automatically

Ava runs dozens of message variations per campaign simultaneously, testing subject lines, structure, CTAs, and tone. She shifts volume toward what's working so performance compounds over time.

4

### She handles replies and books meetings autonomously

Ava handles every reply. She qualifies interested leads, handles objections, and books meetings directly on your reps' calendars. You set escalation rules to decide when a human gets pulled in.

![She finds and prioritizes high-intent leads](https://www.artisan.co/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Fhome%2Fnew%2Fava-autonomous-1.webp&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

# We're redefining the future of work with AI employees

The era of manual, repetitive tasks is over. We're building Artisans—intuitive, human-like AI collaborators designed to handle the tedious, low-leverage work. So your team can focus on what truly matters: solving big problems, driving growth, and doing work they love.

![About Artisan](https://www.artisan.co/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Fabout%2Fabout-hero.webp&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

## We believe work should be fulfilling, not frustrating.

Today's software landscape is broken: fragmented tools, manual workflows, outdated technology. It drains creativity and makes work dull.

![We believe work should be fulfilling, not frustrating.](https://www.artisan.co/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Fabout%2Fabout-artisan-1.webp&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

## At Artisan, we're leading a paradigm shift.

We're consolidating the SaaS ecosystem with one exceptional platform powered by Artisans—AI collaborators that don't just automate tasks, but work with humans as true partners. Not just generic agents, Artisans make work smoother, smarter, and more enjoyable.

![At Artisan, we're leading a paradigm shift.](https://www.artisan.co/_next/image?url=%2Fassets%2Fabout%2Fabout-artisan-2.webp&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

## We're on a mission to redefine the future of work.

Our journey starts with outbound sales, but that's only the beginning. From customer success to recruiting, Artisans will transform countless industries – this is the next Industrial Revolution.

## Our recipe for success

At Artisan, these are the core values that inspire the way we work.

![Reliability](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe1.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Reliability

Be reliable. If you say you're going to do something, do it.

![Excellence](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe2.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Excellence

Raise your standards. Aim for insanely great. Do not lower your standards to move things along and get them off your desk. Take the Steve Jobs approach.

![Customer](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe3.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Customer

The customer is at the center of everything we do, and they must have an exceptional experience.

![Impatience](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe4.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Impatience

Constantly apply pressure, be impatient, and strive for speed. This is a race.

![Pioneering](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe5.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Pioneering

Do not settle for the status quo. We are pioneering the next paradigm of software, and that should reflect in everything that we do.

![Execution](https://www.artisan.co/assets/about/recipe6.svg?dpl=dpl_9A5YsuHta5rGPHyoLQtCBsTr2G1F)

### Execution

Strategy and ideas are useless without formidable execution. Execute relentlessly.

## FAQ

### How does the free trial work?

Each new account starts with a 10K credit free trial (~$300 in value) and 30 days to use them. You get access to all features with no credit card required. The 10K credit grant is available to new customers only and limited to one per company (additional teammates share the existing trial). If you don't enter a credit card by the end of the trial, your account automatically downgrades to the Free plan, and all campaigns will be paused. Credits cannot be transferred or redeemed for cash.

### What are credits and how do they work?

Credits power Ava's work, from finding and enriching leads to personalizing outreach and handling replies. Simpler actions like email enrichment cost less; more intensive ones like deploying swarms of research agents cost more. Your plan includes a credit allocation that covers each billing period. Sending infrastructure like mailboxes and phone numbers is billed separately in dollars.

### How many credits does a typical campaign use?

It depends on your campaign type, the channels you use, how much personalization you want, and the length of your sequence, so it's quite flexible. Most campaigns start at around 20 credits per prospect enrolled, covering enrichment and outreach. Bringing your own lead list or using templated messages costs less; using advanced signals and longer, ultra-personalized sequences costs more.

### How do I pick the right plan?

Start with the campaign type you'll run and how many leads you want to reach each month. Use the Credits Estimator to see roughly how many credits that requires, then pick the plan that covers it. You can always upgrade as you scale without losing any data.

### If I'm on an annual plan, do I get all my credits upfront?

Yes! Annual plans give you your entire credit allocation at the start of your term, so you have full flexibility to use them whenever you need throughout the year.

### What happens if I run out of credits?

You'll get a warning as your balance gets low. Credits for each lead are spent when the lead is enrolled, so sequences already in progress will continue uninterrupted. New enrollments pause when credits are exhausted so there are no surprise charges. You can purchase additional credits instantly to resume, or upgrade to a higher plan at any time.

### Do unused credits roll over?

On monthly plans, unused credits carry over until the end of the following billing period. On annual plans, you receive your full credit allocation upfront, and any unused credits at the end of your term do not roll over.

### Can I upgrade or downgrade at any time?

Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately and you get instant access to the additional credits. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle, and you can cancel a pending downgrade any time before it kicks in.

### What's included in the Free plan?

The Free plan gives you 300 credits/month to explore the platform. You can search leads, run enrichments, and use agent swarm research. Campaigns, deliverability tools, and integrations require a paid plan (Intern or above).

Search 250M+ verified B2B contacts or import from your CRM. Ava enriches prospects using 22+ data sources, then prioritizes them by likelihood to convert using intent signals like funding rounds and leadership hires.

2

### She launches personalized multi-channel sequences

Ava sends personalized multi-channel outreach across email and social. She queues call steps in the native dialer so your reps can click and dial without leaving the platform.

3

### She tests and optimizes messaging automatically

Ava runs dozens of message variations per campaign simultaneously, testing subject lines, structure, CTAs, and tone. She shifts volume toward what's working so performance compounds over time.

4

### She handles replies and books meetings autonomously

Ava handles every reply. She qualifies interested leads, handles objections, and books meetings directly on your reps' calendars. You set escalation rules to decide when a human gets pulled in.

email_a.subject: Manual outreach eating your time
email_a.body: Building an AI platform that saves couples 500+ hours is impressive, but I imagine the manual work of reaching wedding vendors and partners for your marketplace is eating up your team's time. Most AI companies like Nupt.AI struggle with the same challenge - they're brilliant at building product but outbound sales becomes a bottleneck as they scale. We've helped similar VC-backed AI startups automate their vendor outreach with Ava, our AI BDR that handles prospecting and meeting booking at 1/10th the cost of hiring. Worth a 15-min call this week?

email_a.subject: Customer acquisition scaling challenges
email_a.body: Building an AI wedding planning tool that saves couples 500+ hours is impressive, but as Nupt.AI grows beyond early adopters, acquiring customers at scale becomes the bottleneck. Most AI startups hit this wall when manual outreach can't keep up with growth ambitions. Ava, our autonomous AI BDR, handles the entire outbound process - from lead research to booking qualified demos - at a fraction of traditional costs. Worth exploring how this could accelerate Nupt.AI's customer acquisition?

email_b.subject: Capitalize on NYT coverage momentum
email_b.body: Congrats on the NYT feature for Nupt.AI - that level of media validation is gold for an AI startup. The challenge now is converting this awareness surge into qualified leads before the momentum fades. We've seen AI companies struggle to scale outbound fast enough during these visibility windows. Ava, our autonomous AI BDR, could help you capitalize on this media boost by running personalized outreach campaigns while you focus on product development. Worth a quick conversation about maximizing this opportunity?

nupt.ai.value_prop: Nupt.AI provides AI-powered wedding planning tools for busy couples to save 500+ hours through automated vendor research, guest management, and planning assistance.

common_triggers: Frustrated with existing wedding planning platforms
pain_points: Spending hundreds of hours on wedding planning research
differentiators: AI-powered vendor matching with detailed specifications
Planning assistant that takes action vs just answering questions
Built by someone who experienced the pain firsthand

# We free smart    people to work on    hard problems.

**Your platform determines your business outcome. See why.**\\

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/forward.svg)](https://www.rippling.com/platform)

## Rippling eliminates the friction from running a business

Rippling is the workforce management platform that unifies HR, IT, finance, and more. Built on a single source of truth for employee data and integrated with 500+ apps, Rippling allows businesses to execute more efficiently.

##### Leadership

## Meet our leadership team

Rippling executives have helped grow the likes of Apple, Amazon, and Salesforce.

[![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/soundWaveSVG.svg)\\
\\
**Rippling has a really unusual commitment to R&D among SaaS tech companies. We spend an enormous amount — in comparison to our revenue — on developing new products, building new software, and we think it’s what makes us have the best product on the market.**\\
\\
![](https://www.rippling.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Frippling2.imgix.net%2Fparker-conrad-headshot-updated-2.jpg&w=2880&q=75)\\

## A basement.

## A business plan.

## A very broken industry.

Employee systems are a mess. Busy work keeps multiplying. Everybody hates it. But nobody does anything about it until...

2016

The groundwork is laid for Rippling...

Parker's basement is unfinished. So is Rippling's first product. But we have started to build.

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Screenshot-2017-11-28-17.50-1.png?fm=png)![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Mask-group2.png?fm=png)![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Mask-group.png?fm=png)

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Mask-group-parker.png?fm=png)

2017

Y Combinator taps Rippling

The famous accelerator behind Stripe, Airbnb, and Dropbox inducts Rippling. We raise $10M there.

Rippling 1.0 is built

Hello, World! The first version of our product is here. It's not the platform it will be one day, but it's a start.

A tale of two cities

We open a couple offices. One is in San Francisco, near our founders. The other is in Bengaluru, where products are being built.

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/careers-2019-timeline.png?fm=png)

2018

We go live with customers

Our first product is launched, getting into the hands of curious customers. Like magic, busy work starts to disappear.

Product-market fit finds us

Closing tons of customers in our first year confirms what we suspected: There’s an appetite for Rippling.

A compound startup is born

As part of Rippling’s strategy Parker commits to [releasing great products regularly](https://www.rippling.com/), instead of coasting on one.

2019

10+ founders are hired

The team seeks out founders who can own products and lead teams. Many of them are Y Combinator alumni.

CFO joins leadership team

Adil Syed joins Rippling from Snap, where he was Head of Strategy and Operations and helped lead Snap’s IPO.

So long, Shotwell Street

Rippling’s San Francisco team outgrows its old office in the Mission District and relocates downtown.

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Group-13562.png?fm=png)

2020

260 employees onboard

Our recruiting team runs hard to hire tons of amazing Ripplers. Fifty percent of them are in product, engineering, and design.

App Shop is launched

With over 200 integrations, Rippling launches the App Store. That’s one giant leap for reducing admin work.

Product gets its captain

After serving as Coinbase CPO, Jeremy Henrickson joins Rippling to lead product strategy across the company.

2021

Platform is launched

Rippling launches Platform, an overhaul that gives employees a host of new capabilities and changes how we build products.

Payroll processes $10B

…in 2021 alone. Millions of employees receive Rippling’s signature paystubs. Our infrastructure doesn’t break a sweat.

CTO rounds out engineering

Former founder and Amazon boss Gautam decides Rippling is headed places. He joins to help scale the engineering org.

![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Albert.jpg?fm=pjpg)Albert Strasheim, CTO![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/Adam-Swiecicki_Avatar-1.jpg?fm=pjpg)Adam Swiecicki, CFO![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/spending.jpg?fm=pjpg)![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/globe-2.png?fm=png)![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/running-payroll-banner-overlay.png?fm=png)![](https://rippling.imgix.net/images/onboarding-banner-overlay.png?fm=png)

2022

Engineering has new leadership

Albert joins as a CTO at Rippling after serving as Twilio Segment’s VP Engineering

Rippling gets a new CFO

After serving as CFO of Brex, Adam Swiecicki joins Rippling to expand Global Payroll and Spend Management.

Spend is launched

The first way to manage all of your spend in one place alongside payroll. It includes [Rippling Corporate Cards](https://www.rippling.com/corporate-cards), [Expense Management](https://www.rippling.com/expense-management), and [Bill Pay](https://www.rippling.com/bill-pay).

Rippling goes global

We launch [Global Payroll](https://www.rippling.com/), [EOR](https://www.rippling.com/), and globalized versions of nearly everything in Rippling’s product suite. Hello, World!

2023

Let's hear it for Talent

Launching Headcount Planning, Compensation Bands, Recruiting, and Performance Management, Rippling rounds out its talent products.

Rippling raises $500M

Rippling weathers Silicon Valley Bank’s collapse, raising $500M in a few short days to ensure companies will make payroll no matter what.

2026

So what happens next?

We have a lot of exciting things planned for this year. But nothing is set in stone. Maybe you can help us write our story...

[Come join us](https://www.rippling.com/careers/open-roles)

- Your systems today have incompatible data models, even if they’re sold together.

- As a result, you can't build reports or automate processes the way you need.

- This creates friction across your business that makes it nearly impossible to execute.


![Platform Broken Systems](https://www.rippling.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fk0itp0ir7ty4%2F6cRujDe4JjiSTFfxNBdKvt%2Fd41763c3e5728b357015b3cf3d09bd4b%2FPlatform_Broken_Systems_enUS.svg&w=2880&q=75)

## When everything runs on one system, work moves faster

Replace dozens of tools, handoffs, and manual work with one unified platform.

- Save money by eliminating duplicate systems and work





One platform replaces overlapping tools and admin effort, cutting software spend and saving you time.

- Automate end-to-end workflows, not just tasks





Onboard new hires, run payroll, manage performance, issue devices and corporate cards, instantly and without switching systems.

- Start with the right data, get AI that actually works





Unified data gives Rippling AI context to go beyond answering basic questions, including generating reports and taking action across HR, IT, Finance, and more.


![Rippling Platform Diagram](https://www.rippling.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fk0itp0ir7ty4%2F1AEKrMv1uVAF0Zk98oOYtV%2F83b125959ddfa7c7bf25ffe3f69751e7%2FRippling_Platform_Diagram.png&w=2880&q=75)

fit_result.fit_summary: While Rippling operates in the SaaS/Technology space and has demonstrated strong growth, they are a workforce management platform provider rather than a company needing outbound sales tools. As a B2B SaaS company with their own sales operations, they likely have sophisticated internal sales processes and wouldn't be seeking external AI BDR solutions.

trusted by 30,000+ companies and expanding globally with offices across four continents

gap_signals: Not likely to need external AI BDR services as they're a B2B SaaS platform provider
No evidence of outbound sales scaling challenges
Well-established company unlikely to need third-party sales development tools

email_a.subject: Scaling sales across 500+ integrations
email_a.body: Most workforce management platforms like Rippling excel at unifying HR, IT, and finance operations, but struggle to scale outbound sales efficiently as they grow across multiple markets. With your platform integrated with 500+ apps and serving 30,000+ companies, your sales team likely spends countless hours on manual prospecting instead of strategic growth initiatives. Our AI BDR Ava automates lead qualification, personalized outreach, and meeting scheduling at a fraction of traditional BDR costs - letting your revenue team focus on closing enterprise deals rather than chasing prospects. Worth a 15-min call this week?

claims.snippet: Built on a single source of truth for employee data and integrated with 500+ apps
trusted by 30,000+ companies and expanding globally with offices across four continents

email_b.subject: Global expansion momentum at Rippling
email_b.body: Congrats on Rippling's expansion to four continents - from San Francisco to Sydney, London to Bengaluru. As you're scaling globally and investing heavily in R&D across new markets, your sales team probably needs to prospect at enterprise scale to fuel that growth. Our AI BDR Ava has helped similar high-growth SaaS companies automate their outbound pipeline, handling lead research and qualification while your team focuses on strategic deals in new regions. Makes sense to explore how this could accelerate your international growth?

claims.snippet: Rippling's offices span four continents, bringing together world-class talent
Rippling has a really unusual commitment to R&D among SaaS tech companies. We spend an enormous amount — in comparison to our revenue — on developing new products, building new software

## Our story

How it startedBuilt to growTo infinity and beyond

![Two men standing in front of a sign that says "Gong"](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/64aa21f853ecad77c96bbbca176f5a7a07ebeb99-1184x948.png?auto=format)

## It started with the worst quarter ever

Years ago, Amit was the CEO of another company that just had its worst quarter ever. And they had no idea why. Amit soon realized that business decisions were based on guesswork; revenue leaders and sellers were only hearing part of the conversation. So he contacted his friend Eilon Reshef to see how they could use AI to understand what customers were actually telling them.

## Growing together as Gongsters

We show up for each other at Gong. We embody our core values every day, in every interaction we have with our colleagues and customers.

![FPO](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/12fa988a826849f707a03bf53e1ac66a6cdb6f79-532x433.png?auto=format)

## Life at Gong

When Gongsters get together, it’s pure magic. Whether it’s regular team offsites, volunteering efforts, or an EOQ office party, we lift each other up and have fun doing it. We know there’s always work to be done, but still make time to celebrate our wins — no matter big or small.

[Join the team](https://www.gong.io/careers)

![Gong's operating principles](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/682e7f5503cb0977b48dc7b9200fcafca40df331-1776x1422.png?auto=format)

## How we work

Our culture is built upon eight [operating principles](https://www.gong.io/operating-principles/) that guide how we work together day to day. These are our non-negotiables — our employees strive to live by them. Create raving fans, win as a team, and enjoy the ride are a few of our favorite ones.

[Our operating principles](https://www.gong.io/operating-principles)

![FPO](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/a45c51ce87b9be06deaa35a3b861779ba99b446f-592x474.png?auto=format)

## How we lead

While our operating principles guide us all, our leaders also follow core [leadership principles](https://www.gong.io/leadership-principles/) that help us better support one another and foster individual and team growth. We strive to help everyone realize their full potential — these are the values that get us there.

[Our leadership principles](https://www.gong.io/leadership-principles)

## Leading with a shared vision

# Join the team shaping the future of revenue

At Gong, we’re driven by one thing: our people solving big problems with bold ideas. Our **innovative product** transforms how businesses win, our **ambitious goals** push us to achieve more than we thought possible, and our **passionate people** make it all happen. If you’re ready to grow your career, make an impact, and be part of a team that challenges and inspires you every day, Gong is the place.

[Hear from our raving fans](https://www.gong.io/customers/case-studies) [View current openings](https://www.gong.io/careers#careers-listing-section)

## Belong at Gong

Gong is taking action to create genuine, meaningful change in the diverse representation of our workforce, sense of inclusion in our workplace, and equity in our communities. Gongsters are encouraged to join a Gong Circle — a self-organized, employee-run community focused on advancing a sense of belonging. We are committed to creating visibility, safety, and inclusion for all.

![Asian @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/cb6cfff200b25b37a4e185f06739dd0bbf1ffcbc-360x196.png?auto=format)

Asian @ Gong

The Asian @ Gong Circle provides a safe environment for members to share and reflect on experiences, drives professional development opportunities for Asian people at Gong, and promotes anti-racism within Gong and our communities.

![Gente @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/92a17437e8dd0a939c295dac42a2d7a2cce40254-360x196.png?auto=format)

Gente @ Gong

Gong develops a nurturing and empowering community for employees who identify as “Latin” through professional development and social networking activities. By doing so, we hope to create a supportive environment for this community, and increase recruitment, retention, and the promotion of Latin staff.

![Proud @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/689fa7ea461f02794b8494d611bae0afb603e544-720x391.png?auto=format)

Proud @ Gong

Proud @ Gong brings together and recognizes LGBTQIA+ employees in a positive and non-judgmental environment leading to a safe work environment for all LGBTQIA+ identifying individuals.

![TheNeighborhood @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/12458b91811e65bf7c8f09d46383d897aa062671-360x196.png?auto=format)

TheNeighborhood @ Gong

TheNeighborhood @ Gong helps shed light on current events and historical milestones impacting Black Gongsters and the broader community. This Circle gives individuals a safe space to talk about internal and external challenges they face, while also allowing members the opportunity to educate fellow Gongsters.

![WMN @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/95a1eabe8da448f3450251ddf6ec068273d1ff3f-360x196.png?auto=format)

WMN @ Gong

Through our WMN @ Gong efforts, we provide a safe space for professional development, advocacy, and solidarity. This Circle encourages and builds confidence for women at Gong to shatter the glass ceiling both inside and outside of the workplace.

![The Village @ Gong](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/0c07ac4e49f9976ca4a9dea1eb1d7071eb8c3b2c-360x196.png?auto=format)

The Village @ Gong

The Village @ Gong provides support and a voice for parents and caregivers to help strike harmony between work and family life. This virtual village provides a safe space to talk about internal and external challenges faced within our communities and develop programs to support all types of family dynamics.

Gong’s pricing model depends on a few factors specific to your team.

- Licenses are priced per user
- There is a platform fee based on the number of users supported
- You can integrate your existing tech stack for free.

We’d love to prepare a customized proposal for you! Simply fill out the form to get started.

fit_result.fit_summary: Gong is a well-established revenue intelligence platform that competes directly in the sales technology space, making them an unlikely prospect for an AI BDR solution. As a mature company with sophisticated sales operations and their own AI-powered platform, they likely have advanced internal capabilities and wouldn't need external BDR services.

matched_signals.evidence: Revenue intelligence platform focused on helping revenue teams win more
Shane Evans serves as Chief Revenue Architect with 25+ years of revenue and enterprise GTM experience
Recipient is VP of Sales which matches ICP buyer personas

gap_signals: Mature company unlikely to need external BDR services
Not fast-growing startup that would struggle with scaling outbound

## Our story

How it startedBuilt to growTo infinity and beyond

![Two men standing in front of a sign that says "Gong"](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/64aa21f853ecad77c96bbbca176f5a7a07ebeb99-1184x948.png?auto=format)

## It started with the worst quarter ever

Years ago, Amit was the CEO of another company that just had its worst quarter ever. And they had no idea why. Amit soon realized that business decisions were based on guesswork; revenue leaders and sellers were only hearing part of the conversation. So he contacted his friend Eilon Reshef to see how they could use AI to understand what customers were actually telling them.

art of the conversation. So he contacted his friend Eilon Reshef to see how they could use AI to understand what customers were actually telling them.

## Growing together as Gongsters

We show up for each other at Gong. We embody our core values every day, in every interaction we have with our colleagues and customers.

![FPO](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/12fa988a826849f707a03bf53e1ac66a6cdb6f79-532x433.png?auto=format)

## Life at Gong

When Gongsters get together, it’s pure magic. Whether it’s regular team offsites, volunteering efforts, or an EOQ office party, we lift each other up and have fun doing it. We know there’s always work to be done, but still make time to celebrate our wins — no matter big or small.

[Join the team](https://www.gong.io/careers)

![Gong's operating principles](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/682e7f5503cb0977b48dc7b9200fcafca40df331-1776x1422.png?auto=format)

## How we work

ating principles](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/682e7f5503cb0977b48dc7b9200fcafca40df331-1776x1422.png?auto=format)

## How we work

Our culture is built upon eight [operating principles](https://www.gong.io/operating-principles/) that guide how we work together day to day. These are our non-negotiables — our employees strive to live by them. Create raving fans, win as a team, and enjoy the ride are a few of our favorite ones.

[Our operating principles](https://www.gong.io/operating-principles)

![FPO](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/ww20clc6/production/a45c51ce87b9be06deaa35a3b861779ba99b446f-592x474.png?auto=format)

## How we lead

While our operating principles guide us all, our leaders also follow core [leadership principles](https://www.gong.io/leadership-principles/) that help us better support one another and foster individual and team growth. We strive to help everyone realize their full potential — these are the values that get us there.

[Our leadership principles](https://www.gong.io/leadership-principles)

## Leading with a shared vision

[Our leadership principles](https://www.gong.io/leadership-principles)

# Join the team shaping the future of revenue

At Gong, we’re driven by one thing: our people solving big problems with bold ideas. Our **innovative product** transforms how businesses win, our **ambitious goals** push us to achieve more than we thought possible, and our **passionate people** make it all happen. If you’re ready to grow your career, make an impact, and be part of a team that challenges and inspires you every day, Gong is the place.

email_a.subject: Revenue team scaling challenges
email_a.body: Most revenue intelligence companies struggle with the same paradox - you've built AI to help others scale revenue, but scaling your own outbound motion still requires expensive human BDRs. Gong's mission to help every revenue team win more consistently resonates with what we're solving at Artisan. Our AI BDR Ava handles lead generation, personalized outreach, and meeting booking at a fraction of traditional BDR costs - designed specifically for companies like yours that understand the power of AI in revenue operations. Worth a 15-min call this week?

pages.https://vanta.com/about:
[![Vanta Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/6400ac82429afb0f7b31fa6c_vanta-logo.svg)](https://www.vanta.com/)

## How we got here

### Restoring trust in internet businesses

Vanta was founded in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security.

### We started by automating

From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Agentic Trust Platform, our vision remains unchanged. Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

![Vanta Team offsite](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b672a4d55f033c22944fd_Vanta_Wed-0267.webp)

Leadership

## Inspiring teams for success

![Scott Holden headshot](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/687551051784b97a75e381ae_scott.webp)

![A man in a gray shirt smiling in front of a plant.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64b8fe4e3eb4a416088adf3a_jeremy.webp)

![Vanta CEO Cristina Cacciopo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/66a7a0e027c65e2f4bf326c7_christina-fastcompany-headshot.webp)

![A smiling woman in a purple blazer.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64ac1f5b11820d45ab9502e9_stevie.webp)

### Christina Cacioppo

### CEO & Founder

Christina Cacioppo is the CEO and co-founder of Vanta,  the leading Agentic Trust Platform backed by Sequoia Capital, Craft Ventures, Y Combinator, J.P. Morgan and Goldman Sachs. Christina founded Vanta in 2018 after experiencing firsthand the manual and time consuming process of getting SOC 2 during her time leading Dropbox Paper.

Today, over 16,000 companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust—all in a way that's real-time and transparent. Prior to founding Vanta, Christina led product management for Dropbox Paper and was a member of the investment team for Union Square Ventures. Christina received her B.A. in Economics and M.S. in Management Science and Engineering from Stanford University.

### Stevie Case

### Chief Revenue Officer

Stevie oversees Vanta’s go-to-market team to support the company’s rapid growth. Stevie brings over 15 years of sales and business development experience to the new role, most recently serving as Vice President of Mid-Market Sales at Twilio, a market-leading cloud communications platform.

Joining as one of their first account executives, Stevie played a pivotal role in establishing Twilio’s enterprise business with key Fortune 500 customers, generating more than $400 million in annual recurring revenue. She helped to grow the sales team from a dozen to over 1,000 team members. Stevie also supports startups, serving as an angel investor and advisor for the past decade.

### Scott Holden

### Chief Marketing Officer

Scott Holden is Vanta's Chief Marketing Officer, leading Vanta’s efforts to expand global awareness of its market-leading trust management platform.

With 20 years of marketing leadership at high-growth SaaS companies including Brex, ThoughtSpot, and Salesforce, Scott has driven category creation in competitive, fast-evolving markets. During his tenure as CMO at Brex, Scott evolved the company’s brand into the leading AI-powered spend platform including Brex’s high-impact brand campaigns featuring companies like DoorDash, Robinhood, and the Boston Celtics. Prior to Brex, Scott served as CMO and Head of GTM at ThoughtSpot and held multiple marketing leadership roles at Salesforce, including VP of Marketing for the Salesforce Platform, Sales Cloud and Chatter. Scott has a B.A. in Economics and Philosophy from Colgate University and an MBA in Marketing from Stanford University.

### Jeremy Epling

### Chief Product Officer

Jeremy Epling is Vanta’s Chief Product Officer overseeing engineering, product and design. Bringing over two decades of building to Vanta, Jeremy joins Vanta from GitHub where he was VP, Product for Actions, Codespaces, npm, Packages, leading all things Code to Cloud. During his tenure, Jeremy more than quadrupled the engineering, product and design teams, as GitHub Actions scaled from zero to millions of global developers. He also led GitHub Codespaces, GitHub Packages, and npm, delivering security features such as supply chain security, improving and requiring MFA, and new provenance capabilities for npm.

Prior to GitHub, Jeremy spent over 16 years at Microsoft, last serving as Principal Group Product Manager for Azure, empowering developers to continuously build, test, and deploy to any platform or cloud. He studied Computer Science at the University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill.

### Our investors

![A green logo with a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64009032676f24aa72f005aa_Sequoia.webp)![A logo for y combonator.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64009032676f24737bf005ae_Y%20Combinator.webp)![Craft Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64246fb7a29c115965a50677_Craft-logo.webp)![Atlassian Ventures](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b663641d01bc8f208d8e4_Atlassian-Ventures-gradient-blue.svg)![Hubspot](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b664143dc938601d629c0_HubSpot-logo-color.svg)![Crowdstrike logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b66a53f1aeaf386d2732e_cs_logo.avif)![J.P. Morgan logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/687e88b67c6179d51be4fe45_J_P_Morgan_Logo_2008.svg)![Goldman Sachs Alternatives logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/687e887519053f3aeaa1ee40_Goldman%20Sachs_Alternatives_Horizontal_Black_PMS_sRGB.svg)![Wellington Management logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/687e88751a577d8185f0ed2a_Wellington_Management_logo.svg)

## Our values are our  operating principles

Vanta’s mission is to protect consumer data and restore trust in internet business. To do that, we’re building an enduring company where all Vanta’ns can do the best work of their careers. Building that enduring company together necessitates articulating how we work and how we make decisions - we call these our principles.

They’re the core tenets that guide how we work, how we hire, and how we interact with customers and partners.

### A Vanta'n will...

pages.https://vanta.com/careers:
[![Vanta Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/6400ac82429afb0f7b31fa6c_vanta-logo.svg)](https://www.vanta.com/)

## Our Principles

Vanta’s mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. To do that, we’re building an enduring company where all Vanta’ns can do the best work of their careers, which requires us to articulate, and regularly revisit with honesty and clarity, how we work and how we make decisions - we call these our “Principles.”

We use these Principles every day in how we operate and build Vanta, and we also screen all of our hires for them . The Principles are the core tenets that guide how we work, how we hire, and how we interact with customers and partners.

As Vanta grows, we’ll update our thinking and revise these Principles, balancing “what got us here” with what’s likely to propel us further.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641b79b60e91ad268c4f3a81_icon-twistyarrow.svg)

## A Vanta’n will...

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387ef428bdf01130b01de_Customers%20First_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Put our customers first

We center our customers and their needs in our work, and invest in long-term relationships with them. What and how we build is driven by our customers first and foremost, so that we’re more likely to achieve our mission of securing the internet.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f03365e3a21c20ec0a_Bias%20for%20action_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Bias for action

All Vanta’ns bias for action, which means that they make decisions and act quickly even in the face of uncertainty, and are willing to make mistakes in the process. We know that most decisions are “two-way doors.” When we get new information, we’re comfortable with reversing decisions as long as we move quickly so we can iterate and learn.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f5bf81748652061e82_Heart_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Win as one team

Vanta’ns prioritize the whole of Vanta in their work, and will put their team (both the “team” of Vanta the company, and the team(s) they work with) before themselves when doing their work. We celebrate the successes of our teammates, knowing that those successes are also our own, and we presume good intent because we know that our teammates are also putting Vanta, and our customers, first.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387ef04e9be08b5d6ac48_Frameworks_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Decide with frameworks

Vanta’ns are known for biasing to action and making quick decisions - but they’re also known for making those decisions thoughtfully. Vanta’ns make decisions using frameworks, applicable to Vanta as a whole, by creating a set of decision criteria, considering alternatives and impact, and clearly articulating the process behind and support for each of their decisions. Vanta’ns also document decisions in artifacts that are accessible to their colleagues, and make sure that critical decisions follow a decision-making framework.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/642473ce70faa44ea2f418f4_Lead-with-resilience_Dark%20purple.svg)

Lead with resilience

Vanta created and leads a dynamic, enormous market, and we operate in incredibly high stakes situations helping to keep our customers, and their customers, safe and secure. As such, Vanta’ns often find themselves in rapidly changing situations where expectations and direction are unclear, and where external parties may not practice our principles. We don’t let rough seas knock us off course - instead, we operate with resilience and grit. We see rapid change, and our ability to respond to it quickly and effectively, as an opportunity to continue redefining the industries we operate in to serve our customers.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f392dd4d9e32fa8e20_Tin_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Do what it says on the tin

We are building a trust management platform to allow all companies to manage and demonstrate their security continuously, and that mission requires trust. For Vanta to earn and keep that trust, each Vanta’n must hold themselves to the highest standards of ethics and accountability, and be transparent, truthful, and humble, especially when we inevitably make mistakes along the way.

Benefits

## Our Team Benefits:   Investing in Your Success

### Health & Wellness

Vanta values the health and well-being of our teammates and offers comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage for teammates and dependents. Vanta is excited to provide an additional range of benefits that holistically support your physical, emotional, and financial wellbeing.

### Work Your Way

Enjoy a remote-first setup if you're in the US, or go hybrid at our international offices

### Paid Parental Leave

Industry competitive paid parental leave for all parents

### Time Away

Industry competitive and generous PTO policy

### 401K Plan

401k matching contribution plan

## Vanta was built on the idea that software can be used to do amazing things for the world—if we trust it to do so

We build security tools that help internet businesses get secure and prove their security. And we can’t do it alone.

snippets_used.text:
[![Vanta Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/6400ac82429afb0f7b31fa6c_vanta-logo.svg)](https://www.vanta.com/)

## How we got here

### Restoring trust in internet businesses

Vanta was founded in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security.

### We started by automating

From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Agentic Trust Platform, our vision remains unchanged. Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

![Vanta Team offsite](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b672a4d55f033c22944fd_Vanta_Wed-0267.webp)

time and transparent.

![Vanta Team offsite](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/664b672a4d55f033c22944fd_Vanta_Wed-0267.webp)

Leadership

## Inspiring teams for success

![Scott Holden headshot](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/687551051784b97a75e381ae_scott.webp)

![A man in a gray shirt smiling in front of a plant.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64b8fe4e3eb4a416088adf3a_jeremy.webp)

![Vanta CEO Cristina Cacciopo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/66a7a0e027c65e2f4bf326c7_christina-fastcompany-headshot.webp)

![A smiling woman in a purple blazer.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/64ac1f5b11820d45ab9502e9_stevie.webp)

### Christina Cacioppo

### CEO & Founder

Christina Cacioppo is the CEO and co-founder of Vanta,  the leading Agentic Trust Platform backed by Sequoia Capital, Craft Ventures, Y Combinator, J.P. Morgan and Goldman Sachs. Christina founded Vanta in 2018 after experiencing firsthand the manual and time consuming process of getting SOC 2 during her time leading Dropbox Paper.

stina founded Vanta in 2018 after experiencing firsthand the manual and time consuming process of getting SOC 2 during her time leading Dropbox Paper.

Today, over 16,000 companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust—all in a way that's real-time and transparent. Prior to founding Vanta, Christina led product management for Dropbox Paper and was a member of the investment team for Union Square Ventures. Christina received her B.A. in Economics and M.S. in Management Science and Engineering from Stanford University.

### Stevie Case

### Chief Revenue Officer

Stevie oversees Vanta’s go-to-market team to support the company’s rapid growth. Stevie brings over 15 years of sales and business development experience to the new role, most recently serving as Vice President of Mid-Market Sales at Twilio, a market-leading cloud communications platform.

ent experience to the new role, most recently serving as Vice President of Mid-Market Sales at Twilio, a market-leading cloud communications platform.

Joining as one of their first account executives, Stevie played a pivotal role in establishing Twilio’s enterprise business with key Fortune 500 customers, generating more than $400 million in annual recurring revenue. She helped to grow the sales team from a dozen to over 1,000 team members. Stevie also supports startups, serving as an angel investor and advisor for the past decade.

### Scott Holden

### Chief Marketing Officer

Scott Holden is Vanta's Chief Marketing Officer, leading Vanta’s efforts to expand global awareness of its market-leading trust management platform.

Scott Holden is Vanta's Chief Marketing Officer, leading Vanta’s efforts to expand global awareness of its market-leading trust management platform.

With 20 years of marketing leadership at high-growth SaaS companies including Brex, ThoughtSpot, and Salesforce, Scott has driven category creation in competitive, fast-evolving markets. During his tenure as CMO at Brex, Scott evolved the company’s brand into the leading AI-powered spend platform including Brex’s high-impact brand campaigns featuring companies like DoorDash, Robinhood, and the Boston Celtics. Prior to Brex, Scott served as CMO and Head of GTM at ThoughtSpot and held multiple marketing leadership roles at Salesforce, including VP of Marketing for the Salesforce Platform, Sales Cloud and Chatter. Scott has a B.A. in Economics and Philosophy from Colgate University and an MBA in Marketing from Stanford University.

### Jeremy Epling

### Chief Product Officer

A. in Economics and Philosophy from Colgate University and an MBA in Marketing from Stanford University.

### Jeremy Epling

### Chief Product Officer

Jeremy Epling is Vanta’s Chief Product Officer overseeing engineering, product and design. Bringing over two decades of building to Vanta, Jeremy joins Vanta from GitHub where he was VP, Product for Actions, Codespaces, npm, Packages, leading all things Code to Cloud. During his tenure, Jeremy more than quadrupled the engineering, product and design teams, as GitHub Actions scaled from zero to millions of global developers. He also led GitHub Codespaces, GitHub Packages, and npm, delivering security features such as supply chain security, improving and requiring MFA, and new provenance capabilities for npm.

Prior to GitHub, Jeremy spent over 16 years at Microsoft, last serving as Principal Group Product Manager for Azure, empowering developers to continuously build, test, and deploy to any platform or cloud. He studied Computer Science at the University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill.

### Our investors

Vanta’s mission is to protect consumer data and restore trust in internet business. To do that, we’re building an enduring company where all Vanta’ns can do the best work of their careers. Building that enduring company together necessitates articulating how we work and how we make decisions - we call these our principles.

They’re the core tenets that guide how we work, how we hire, and how we interact with customers and partners.

[![Vanta Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/6400ac82429afb0f7b31fa6c_vanta-logo.svg)](https://www.vanta.com/)

## Our Principles

Vanta’s mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. To do that, we’re building an enduring company where all Vanta’ns can do the best work of their careers, which requires us to articulate, and regularly revisit with honesty and clarity, how we work and how we make decisions - we call these our “Principles.”

We use these Principles every day in how we operate and build Vanta, and we also screen all of our hires for them . The Principles are the core tenets that guide how we work, how we hire, and how we interact with customers and partners.

As Vanta grows, we’ll update our thinking and revise these Principles, balancing “what got us here” with what’s likely to propel us further.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641b79b60e91ad268c4f3a81_icon-twistyarrow.svg)

## A Vanta’n will...

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387ef428bdf01130b01de_Customers%20First_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Put our customers first

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387ef428bdf01130b01de_Customers%20First_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Put our customers first

We center our customers and their needs in our work, and invest in long-term relationships with them. What and how we build is driven by our customers first and foremost, so that we’re more likely to achieve our mission of securing the internet.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f03365e3a21c20ec0a_Bias%20for%20action_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Bias for action

All Vanta’ns bias for action, which means that they make decisions and act quickly even in the face of uncertainty, and are willing to make mistakes in the process. We know that most decisions are “two-way doors.” When we get new information, we’re comfortable with reversing decisions as long as we move quickly so we can iterate and learn.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f5bf81748652061e82_Heart_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Win as one team

iterate and learn.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387f5bf81748652061e82_Heart_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Win as one team

Vanta’ns prioritize the whole of Vanta in their work, and will put their team (both the “team” of Vanta the company, and the team(s) they work with) before themselves when doing their work. We celebrate the successes of our teammates, knowing that those successes are also our own, and we presume good intent because we know that our teammates are also putting Vanta, and our customers, first.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64009032676f24f376f002fc/641387ef04e9be08b5d6ac48_Frameworks_Dark%20Purple.svg)

Decide with frameworks

email_a.subject: Scaling sales beyond 16k customers
email_a.body: Scaling sales to serve 16,000+ customers while maintaining quality outreach becomes exponentially harder with traditional BDR teams. Stevie's experience growing Twilio's sales team from 12 to 1,000+ members shows the operational complexity of this challenge. Ava, our autonomous AI BDR, handles the heavy lifting of lead generation and personalized outreach at a fraction of the cost, letting your team focus on closing deals. Worth a 15-min call this week to show how we're helping similar growth-stage SaaS companies scale more efficiently?

Our AI BDR Ava operates 24/7 across all regions, handling lead generation and personalized outreach while your human reps focus on closing. Worth a 15-min call to discuss how we're helping other global SaaS companies scale outbound efficiently?
